titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Collection of Drama 131 Course Materials
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Staff

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 8778828.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:05

did.abstract: Collection contains course readings, student papers, and technical schematics from the Drama 131 Technical Theatre course.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The Collection of Drama 131 Course Materials was housed in the former Drama Library until its transfer to the Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library in 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Drama 131 Course Materials, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection contains course readings, student papers, and technical schematics from the Drama 131 Technical Theatre course.

did.unittitle: Experiment in the Efficiency of Canvas Glue
Report of Work on "Plaster Mache": Process and Uses
A Translation of "Caracteristiques Du Theatre Pigalle" and introduction to the book "Theatres-Cinemas"
A Method of Raising People on Invisible Supports
Special Problem: "Theatre Production for Vocational Schools"
Report on Some Factors Affecting Recognition in the Theatre
Data on Various Stage Lighting Equipments
A Proposed System for fire Protection of the Proscenium Arch in the Flexible Theater
Lighting Galleries for the Main Stage of the Yale University Theatre
Propaganda Techniques and the Open Stage
A Manual of Procedure for Purchasing and Bookkeeping at The Yale School of Drama
131 Project #3 Some Maine Hardware for the Theater
Recommended Lighting Levels for the Theatre Building
Methods of Making Fog and Smoke for the Theatre
Experiments with Industrial Dye and Its Use in Stage Scenery
An Overhung Swivel Loft Block for Wire Rope
131 Project: Video Tape and Closed Circuit T.V. for the Performing Arts
Plan for Lifting Device for Hemp Rigging Systems
Radio Amplification for Off Stage Noises
Experiments on Breaking Strains of Lumber Sash Cord Wire
The Imitation of Decorative Textiles For Use on the Stage
Sound Systems and Their Relation to the Legitimate Theater
